model: Boeing 717 (MD-95; stands in for DC-9/MD-80/MD-88/717 T-tail family)
license: CC-BY 3.0 (zip LICENSE.txt; IA mirror metadata lists CC-BY 4.0)
author: A. C. (Adcoff72)
notes: ASCII STL, single complete aircraft, ~1:1000 (38.1mm length). Fetched via Internet Archive Thingiverse mirror (no auth). Author's actual MD-80 (thing:3782074) and DC-9-32 (thing:3782081) are CC-BY-NC - avoided.

author: Fredepo
notes: Binary STL, single piece. Bbox 29x36mm looks slightly long for a CRJ-200 - eyeball before shipping.

author: RTicknor
notes: MERGED by this review from the zip's 4 binary STL parts (nose/tail/wing_a/wing_b) which share one assembled coordinate frame; verify seams visually. Source zip fetched from Wayback Machine (no auth).

author: A. C. (Adcoff72)
notes: ASCII STL, single complete aircraft, dims match ERJ-145 (29.8x20.5mm ~1:1000).

model: Fairchild-Dornier 328JET (high-wing T-tail regional; jet engines, not props)
author: A. C. (Adcoff72)
notes: Closest freely-licensed high-wing regional silhouette found. Same author's 328 TURBOPROP (thing:3518179) is the exact ATR-like shape but CC-BY-NC-ND - unusable. No CC-BY ATR-42/72 or Dash 8 found anywhere.

model: Let L-410 Turbolet fuselage (high-wing twin turboprop)
author: AVIZO
notes: Part 1/4. CAUTION: parts are print-plated (each on z=0), NOT positioned for assembly - needs manual placement in Blender before use as a marker.

model: Let L-410 Turbolet outer wing (print twice)
author: AVIZO
Giddi
notes: Binary STL, single piece, dims match GV at 1/200. Best Gulfstream match for N47BA-type flights.

author: adami747
notes: Binary STL. Oriented nose-up (fuselage along z, display-stand orientation); zip also has ARM/BASE stand parts (not kept). Wayback-fetched zip.

author: killian-3180 (repo; STL provenance within repo not stated - possibly sourced from a CAD library, treat as weakest license claim here)
notes: OVER poly budget (178k tris) - would need decimation. Backup only; prefer g550/g280.

author: pumpkinhead3d
notes: Binary STL, main airframe single piece; proportions match DC-3. Separate engine/prop STLs exist in the zip (not kept). Wayback-fetched zip.

license: CC-BY (Thingiverse license code 'cc' = Creative Commons Attribution; IA mirror metadata CC-BY 4.0)
author: jpoponea
notes: OVER poly budget (410k tris, 20MB) - single piece, very detailed; needs heavy decimation. Backup to dc3-pumpkinhead.
